blockers: No local SoccerNetGS validation archive is staged for the fixed 12-clip medium suite. The only upstream validation artifact exposed by SoccerNet/SN-GSR-2025 is valid.zip (~11.17 GB), and a direct hf_hub_download probe in this workspace warned that the target needed 11169.50 MB while the local destination only had 10698.60 MB free before the download could proceed.
